item.title: 1973 American Motors Spotlight
item.description: A spotlight on a 1973 American Motors vehicle, showcasing its styling, engineering, and place in automotive history. What made AMC cars unique in their era?

media:content.media:title: 1973 American Motors Spotlight
media:content.media:description: A spotlight on a 1973 American Motors vehicle, showcasing its styling, engineering, and place in automotive history. What made AMC cars unique in their era?

item.title: A Look Inside a 1958 Bonneville Dash
item.description: A detailed look at the dashboard and interior design of a 1958 Pontiac Bonneville, highlighting classic American styling. What defined luxury interiors in the late ’50s?

media:content.media:description: A detailed look at the dashboard and interior design of a 1958 Pontiac Bonneville, highlighting classic American styling. What defined luxury interiors in the late ’50s?

item.title: A standout ’60s car feature
item.description: A detailed look at a standout feature from a 1960s classic car, highlighting design details and storytelling from automotive history. What small details defined ’60s car design?

item.title: The 1964 Plymouth Savoy Tribute
item.description: A tribute build inspired by the 1964 Plymouth Savoy brings classic styling and muscle-era character back to life. What makes tribute builds so popular among enthusiasts?

media:content.media:title: The 1964 Plymouth Savoy Tribute
media:content.media:description: A tribute build inspired by the 1964 Plymouth Savoy brings classic styling and muscle-era character back to life. What makes tribute builds so popular among enthusiasts?

item.title: Quirky 1963 Trojan 200 Microcar
item.description: A rare and quirky 1963 Trojan 200 microcar highlights compact design and unusual engineering. How did microcars fit into everyday life?

media:content.media:description: A rare and quirky 1963 Trojan 200 microcar highlights compact design and unusual engineering. How did microcars fit into everyday life?

item.title: 1936 Auburn 852 Classic Luxury Spotlight
item.description: A stunning 1936 Auburn 852 showcases pre-war luxury design, craftsmanship, and automotive elegance. What made Auburn cars so special in their era?

item.title: 50s or 2000s Ford: Which Would You Pick?
item.description: A side-by-side look at classic 1950s Ford styling versus modern 2000s Ford performance and comfort. Which era would you choose to drive every day?

item.title: 1970 Plymouth Superbird Story
item.description: A 1970 Plymouth Superbird is featured with personal stories and insights into its history and significance. Why does the Superbird remain such an icon?

item.title: A Rare 1966 Chevy Yenko Stinger

item.title: Prototype 1971 Dodge Daytona concept
item.description: A rare prototype concept of the 1971 Dodge Daytona explores aerodynamic design and early performance innovation. What made Daytona concepts so influential?

item.title: 1962 Pontiac Catalina 421 Super Duty 4-Speed
item.description: A 1962 Pontiac Catalina equipped with a 421 Super Duty engine and 4-speed transmission highlights early muscle car performance. Why are factory performance builds so rare?

item.title: Hear the Tri-Power Engine in a '59 Classic
item.description: A classic 1959 car with a Tri-Power setup is showcased for its iconic engine sound and performance feel. What makes Tri-Power engines so legendary?

item.title: 1968 Corvette: Street to Track Story

item.title: Hand-Built Luxury: Limited Edition Hurst 300H
item.description: A rare Hurst 300H showcases hand-built craftsmanship and limited-production luxury performance design. What makes low-production cars so desirable?

item.title: A 10-Year 1965 Mustang Fastback Rebuild
item.description: A long-term restoration brings a 1965 Mustang Fastback back to life through years of dedication and detailed work. What keeps a project like this going for a decade?

media:content.media:description: A long-term restoration brings a 1965 Mustang Fastback back to life through years of dedication and detailed work. What keeps a project like this going for a decade?
